basic_details.job_title: Rubber Board Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Rubber Board Young Professional Notification 2026 has been released on 7 May 2026 on the official website Rubber Board. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Rubber Board Young Professional Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 30 years and qualification of MBA Marketing / Agri Business Management with knowledge in computer applications are eligible to apply for these Young Professional vacancies.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years as on 01-05-2026. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA Marketing / Agri Business Management, Knowledge in computer applications
qualification.details: Young Professional: Essential: MBA Marketing / Agri Business Management, Knowledge in computer applications. Desirable: Knowledge in Digital Marketing, Communication skills in English & Hindi, Work experience in marketing/sales/market research.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Rubber Board Young Professional Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.rubberboard.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Rubber Board Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Young Professional post is 19th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBA in Marketing or Agri Business Management, along with knowledge of computer applications. Desirable qualifications include knowledge in Digital Marketing and good communication skills.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Young Professional post is 30 years, as of 1st May 2026. Age relaxation details are not provided in the current information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Young Professional position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Rubber Board Young Professional vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Rubber Board Young Professional recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview. Candidates are advised to prepare well for both stages.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Rubber Board located?
faq.answer: The Rubber Board is located in Kottayam, Kerala, with the pincode 686009. The application needs to be sent to the official address of the Rubber Board.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Young Professional position is a contractual job. The duration of the contract is not specified in the provided data, but it is a contractual appointment.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the Rubber Board's official website, www.rubberboard.gov.in. Ensure you download the correct documents for the Young Professional recruitment.
